onboarding.locatingTitle: Bringing the target area into view
onboarding.locatingDescription: The overlay is trying to find the related product area and scroll it into a safe visible position.
onboarding.fallbackTitle: This step continues as a generic explanation
onboarding.fallbackDescription: The target element could not be found right now. The step still continues with its explanation, and you can go back if needed.
onboarding.saveErrorTitle: Onboarding state could not be saved
onboarding.saveErrorInline: The tour state could not be saved right now. You can try again or close this layer and return later.
onboarding.missingTarget: This step target is not visible right now. The flow continues with a safe fallback.
onboarding.toastError: Onboarding state could not be saved. Please try again.
onboarding.routeChangedToast: Onboarding was closed safely because the route changed.
onboarding.routeChangedAnnouncement: Onboarding was paused because the screen changed. It can open again when you return to planner.

planner.title: Planner
planner.description: Central hub for courses, tasks, and habits.

tracker.title: Tracker
tracker.description: Session-based time tracking and goal-driven reports.

habits.title: Habits
habits.description: Daily habit tracking and streak system.

student.title: Student
student.description: I use it for courses, assignments, and exams.

working.title: Working
working.description: I use it for projects, tasks, and work flows.

both.title: Both
both.description: I use it for both school and professional life.

welcome.title: Welcome to the planner overview
welcome.description: This tour will walk you through the main blocks of PLAN.EX. You can skip at any time.

modules.title: Which modules will you use?
modules.description: Select the modules that best fit your workflow. You can change this later in settings.

planner.title: Planner — your courses, tasks, and habits
planner.description: Manage all your courses, assignments, and habits from here.

tracker.title: Tracker — track your time
tracker.description: Start sessions, monitor your activities, and see your progress against goals.

habits.title: Today's habits area
habits.description: Mark due habits directly from this block and keep an eye on your streak health.

calendar.title: Jump to the calendar view
calendar.description: Your events, exams, and date pressure live in the calendar area, and planner connects to it quickly.

goals.title: Quick actions menu
goals.description: Start frequent actions like creating a task, marking a habit, or jumping into tracker from here.

usage.title: How will you use it?
usage.description: Tell us your usage profile so we can tailor the experience for you.

command.title: Start from the command bar
command.description: Search tasks, courses, and records here, or jump to tracker and external search actions with shortcuts.

overview.title: Welcome to the planner overview
overview.description: This screen collects today's focus, progress summary, and the main product blocks you will act on first.

navigation.title: Header and shell navigation live here
navigation.description: The top bar and nearby controls are the main place for command search, quick jumps, and daily shell navigation.

quickActions.title: Quick actions menu
quickActions.description: Start frequent actions like creating a task, marking a habit, or jumping into tracker from here.

preferences.title: Theme and language switch instantly
preferences.description: Theme and language controls stay visible in the shell, and changes are synced with your profile preferences.

closing.title: Settings and replay access
closing.description: The tour ends here. You can later return to profile, onboarding replay, and personal preferences from settings.

calendar_legacy.title: Jump to the calendar view
calendar_legacy.description: Your events, exams, and date pressure live in the calendar area, and planner connects to it quickly.

habits_legacy.title: Today's habits area
habits_legacy.description: Mark due habits directly from this block and keep an eye on your streak health.

tracker_legacy.title: Tracker module access
tracker_legacy.description: Time tracking, session records, and goals live in the tracker area; there is a quick access point here.
